name: Candied Citrus Peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fruit.
2. Score the peel into quarters.
3. Remove sections of peel with fingers; cut into uniform strips about 3/8 inch wide.
4. Place the citrus peel in a large pot and cover with 6 cups cold water. Bring to a boil, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
5. Drain and rinse the peel.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with 6 cups fresh water.
7. In a large saucepan, combine 1 1/2 cups sugar, honey, and boiling water. Stir until dissolved.
8. Bring to a boil, then boil about one minute.
9. Add the cooked, drained peel to the saucepan and simmer briskly for about 30 minutes, or until most of the syrup has been absorbed (to prevent sticking).
10. Transfer the peel to a colander and drain well for about 10 minutes.
11. In a large bowl, toss the drained peel with the remaining 1 cup sugar to coat evenly.
12. Spread the pieces on waxed paper to dry.
13. Store in a tightly covered container.
